name: io.github.marras0914/cordon
title: Cordon
description: Security gateway for MCP tool calls. Sits between your LLM client and your MCP servers — enforcing per-tool policies (allow, block, approve, read-only, log-only), logging every call, and pausing dangerous operations for human approval in the terminal or Slack.

packageArguments.description: Start the Cordon proxy. Reads cordon.config.ts from the current directory.
